REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (120-122 Scott Street, San Francisco Ca 94117)
Off Calendar Mar-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Mia Wilson.

The sale was confirmed at $1,502,000.00 to Naomi Glass on behalf of her Client Lisa Kwak based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed February 18, 2014. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
